name: Marinade and Basting Sauce for Brisket of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Pour the marinade over the whole beef brisket, ensuring it is evenly coated.
3. Let the brisket marinate for several hours, or overnight if possible.
4. Use the same marinade as a basting sauce during cooking. Adjust the amount of dry red wine in the sauce to suit personal taste preferences; any unused liquid can be used elsewhere in the cooking process.
